title: Make a bounded CLI fix
goal: Complete one requested CLI fix without broadening PersonaKit into orchestration or unrelated refactoring.

steps.text: Read the active contract and identify the target command or output.
Make the smallest implementation or documentation change that satisfies the request.
Stop for review if the request requires arbitrary command execution, persistence, or task orchestration.
Verify the change and summarize the result.

acceptanceCriteria: The change is limited to the requested CLI behavior
No new autonomous execution behavior is introduced
